title: Poikilospermum oblongifolium
intro: Poikilospermum oblongifolium, also known as the Pacific copperleaf or copper bush, is a plant species belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in the treatment of various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. The bioactive constituents of P. oblongifolium include flavonoids, tannins, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, P. oblongifolium is often prepared as a decoction or an infusion, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, and is also used in the production of herbal teas and extracts.
